title: microcharis ammophila
intro: Microcharis ammophila is a plant species, also known as the Beach Murraya or Sea Murraya, which is native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Microcharis ammophila include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions of the leaves and roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
